generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security and stability, I've always believed in strong alliances. But have you seen how much we're spending on defense compared to what our allies contribute? It's time we focus on protecting our own interests first. Our tax dollars should go to ensuring our safety, not carrying the burden for others. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceFairness
